title: Aureline local-core continuity packet
description: Boundary schema for the local_core_continuity_packet_record. The packet resolves one locality + tenancy + key-mode posture, one typed control-plane degrade state (sync/registry/relay/AI/auth/policy/docs/catalog/telemetry), one typed data-plane continuity state (local editing/save/search/Git/tasks/docs/export/diagnostics), retained-local-safe versus blocked-managed-only capability lists, a freshness posture, a restore class, and mirror/air-gap continuity fields for any managed, enterprise, mirror, or local-first claim Aureline surfaces consume. Managed and enterprise deployment profiles MUST carry region/tenant/key posture so control-plane outages cannot silently collapse into generic product failure when local-safe work remains. Support bundles, boundary-manifest strawman rows, deployment-drill catalog rows, and DR drill artifacts consume the same vocabulary this packet freezes rather than inventing per-surface locality schemas. Narrative companion: docs/deployment/locality_and_continuity_seed.md. Machine-readable locality matrix: artifacts/deployment/locality_matrix.yaml.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this packet. Additive-minor changes bump this integer.

packet_id.description: Stable packet id. Snake_case. MUST NOT contain milestone slugs.

scenario_summary.description: One-paragraph product-term summary of the continuity scenario the packet describes.

control_plane_state_by_service_class.description: Typed control-plane state, one entry per service class in play. Tooling MUST reject duplicate service_class entries; the JSON Schema boundary here only pins the row shape. Missing entries mean the service is not applicable for this packet.

data_plane_state_by_capability_class.description: Typed data-plane continuity state, one entry per local-safe capability class. Tooling MUST reject duplicate capability_class entries. Every packet MUST state the continuity of local editing, save, search, Git, and export explicitly rather than let generic product-failure copy collapse them.

retained_local_safe_capabilities.description: Product-term sentences naming what remains available to the user without the managed path. Reuses the vocabulary convention the deployment drill catalog seed already uses.

blocked_managed_only_capabilities.description: Product-term sentences naming what is intentionally blocked while this posture holds. Empty list is valid only when no managed form exists for this row (for example, a pure local_core capability).

linked_drill_refs.description: Drill ids from artifacts/support/deployment_drill_catalog_seed.yaml this packet conforms to. Empty when the packet captures a novel posture pending a new drill row.

linked_boundary_rows.description: Boundary-manifest capability ids this packet maps to. Reserved so boundary rows' local_core_continuity and absence_narrows_to clauses can point at the same packet shape.

evidence_outputs.description: Evidence output ids drawn from the deployment drill catalog seed. Packets MUST name at least one evidence output so later support bundles or release reviews cite the same artefact family.

narrative_refs.description: Repo-relative pointers into the narrative seed and any related companion documents.

__fixture__.description: Optional fixture annotation block. Convention carries the fixture name, scenario, linked drills, and contract sections exercised; never part of the runtime record.

allOf.description: Managed, enterprise, and self-hosted deployment profiles MUST carry an actionable region and tenant posture. Packets for these profiles cannot set region_scope or tenant_scope to not_applicable; silent not_applicable values on these profiles mean the packet is not reviewable.

Mirror-only or air-gap postures MUST name the continuity truth they rely on. If any control-plane service reports mirror_only OR the deployment profile is air_gapped, the packet MUST populate mirror_continuity_fields.mirror_snapshot_id and mirror_continuity_fields.mirror_freshness_class.
Air-gapped deployment profiles MUST also populate air_gap_continuity_fields so offline-bundle provenance, trust-root identity, and last-import freshness are not silently blank.
Bounded-stale freshness MUST name a freshness floor ref; unbounded-stale MUST carry a human-readable rationale so stale cached truth is never surfaced without accountability.
Cross-plane boundary-recheck postures MUST pin restore_class to manual_reconcile_after_boundary_change so privileged replay cannot resume until an explicit recheck has run.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short product-term sentence suitable for support, boundary, and drill review surfaces.

stable_token.description: Snake_case stable token. Does not contain milestone slugs.

opaque_fingerprint.description: Opaque stable fingerprint safe to log and export. Raw key bytes, raw tokens, and raw path bytes never appear here.

deployment_profile_class.description: Closed deployment-profile vocabulary, re-exported from the boundary-manifest strawman and the deployment drill catalog seed.

processing_location_class.description: Where product compute normally runs for the row being described.

storage_location_class.description: Where the row's primary durable state lives. File-based and text-based stores are strongly preferred; mirrors and offline bundles are explicit stores, not fallbacks.

tenant_org_scope_class.description: Tenant or org scope. Managed/enterprise packets MUST set this to an actionable value (not not_applicable).

retention_class.description: Retention posture in force for the row. Managed/enterprise packets MUST name a concrete retention class.

key_mode_class.description: Key / signing mode. Managed/enterprise packets MUST set this to an actionable value (not not_applicable).

control_plane_service_class.description: Closed control-plane service vocabulary. Support bundles, drill rows, and boundary-manifest rows resolve against this set rather than minting per-surface outage names.

control_plane_service_state_class.description: Typed control-plane state. boundary_recheck_required pins privileged replay off until a region/tenant/key posture recheck runs.

data_plane_capability_class.description: Closed data-plane capability vocabulary. Packets MUST state each class explicitly rather than let generic product-failure copy stand in.

data_plane_capability_state_class.description: Typed data-plane capability state. reduced_read_only lets packets express partial continuity without overclaiming.

freshness_floor_ref.description: Opaque ref identifying the freshness floor that still holds. Required on bounded_stale.

staleness_rationale.description: Human-readable rationale for unbounded_stale. Required on unbounded_stale so stale truth is never surfaced silently.

restore_class.description: Restore vocabulary re-exported from the deployment drill catalog seed.

mirror_continuity_fields.description: Mirror-only / mirror-backed continuity truth. The top-level schema pins these fields as required when any service reports mirror_only or the deployment profile is air_gapped.

mirror_snapshot_id.description: Opaque mirror snapshot id. Raw URLs and raw paths do not appear here.

offline_import_source_class.description: Source of an offline bundle import. Air-gapped packets MUST name a concrete class.

air_gap_continuity_fields.description: Air-gap / offline continuity truth. The top-level schema pins these fields as required when the deployment profile is air_gapped.

evidence_output_class.description: Evidence-output vocabulary re-exported from the deployment drill catalog seed so support bundles and release review cite the same artefact family.
